admin.add_items_private_data: ℹ️ Please send the data that the user will receive after purchase. Note: If you enter one line, you will add one product, if you enter multiple lines, you will add multiple products. 1 line=1 item 10 rows=10 items. If you want to abort adding items enter "cancel".

admin.add_items_private_data_physical: ℹ️ Please send the quantity of items you want to sell:
admin.add_items_json_msg:
📄 Send .json file with new items or type "cancel" for cancel. File content example: 
[
  {
    "item_type": "Physical",
    "category": "Category#1",
    "subcategory": "Subcategory#1",
    "price": 50,
    "description": "Mocked description",
    "private_data": null
  },
  {
    "item_type": "Digital",
    "category": "Category#2",
    "subcategory": "Subcategory#2",
    "price": 100,
    "description": "Mocked description",
    "private_data": "Mocked private data"
  }
]
admin.add_items_txt_msg:
📄 Send .txt file with new items or type "cancel" for cancel. File content example: 
PHYSICAL;CATEGORY#1;SUBCATEGORY#1;DESCRIPTION#1;50.0;null
PHYSICAL;CATEGORY#1;SUBCATEGORY#1;DESCRIPTION#1;50.0;null
PHYSICAL;CATEGORY#1;SUBCATEGORY#1;DESCRIPTION#1;50.0;null
PHYSICAL;CATEGORY#1;SUBCATEGORY#1;DESCRIPTION#1;50.0;null
DIGITAL;CATEGORY#1;SUBCATEGORY#1;DESCRIPTION#1;50.0;PRIVATE_DATA#5
DIGITAL;CATEGORY#1;SUBCATEGORY#1;DESCRIPTION#1;50.0;PRIVATE_DATA#6
DIGITAL;CATEGORY#1;SUBCATEGORY#1;DESCRIPTION#1;50.0;PRIVATE_DATA#7
DIGITAL;CATEGORY#1;SUBCATEGORY#1;DESCRIPTION#1;50.0;PRIVATE_DATA#8

user.faq_string: ⚠️ In our store ignorance of the rules does not exempt you from responsibility. Buying at least one product in the store you automatically agree with all the rules of the store! Rules of the store ❗1.In case of inadequate/offensive behavior the seller has the right to refuse the service! ❗2.A replacement is provided only if the product is invalid. ❗3.Replacement is provided only if there is a video proof. ❗4.30 minutes warranty period. ❗5.The administration is not responsible for any unlawful actions performed by the buyer with the items purchased in the store. ❗6.These terms and conditions may change at any time. ❗7.Money cannot be withdrawn from your balance.

user.referral_statistics_message: ✨ Referral Program Invite friends and earn bonus balance inside the bot. Bonuses can be used to purchase digital and physical products. 🔓 Referral Access Your total deposits: {currency_sym}{user_total_deposits:.2f} Required to unlock referrals: {currency_sym}{min_referrer_total_deposit:.2f} Status: {referral_access_status} 🎁 What your friend gets • {referral_bonus_percent}% bonus on each deposit • Applies to the first {referral_bonus_deposit_limit} deposits • Maximum bonus cap: {referral_bonus_cap_percent}% of their deposits 💰 What you get as a referrer • {referrer_bonus_percent}% from each referral deposit • Applies to the first {referrer_bonus_deposit_limit} deposits per referral • Maximum bonus cap: {referrer_bonus_cap_percent}% per referral Global bonus cap: Total bonuses (you + referral) will never exceed {total_bonus_cap_percent}% of referral deposits 📊 Your Referral Stats 👥 Referrals invited: {referrals_count} 🎁 Bonuses earned as referral: {currency_sym}{referral_bonus_earned:.2f} 💰 Bonuses earned as referrer: {currency_sym}{referrer_bonus_earned:.2f}
